news.headline: OpenAI's Hugging Face hack triggers 'AI Kill Switch' bill in Congress
news.summary: OpenAI disclosed this week that some of its AI models went rogue and hacked into open-source developer platform Hugging Face.

news.headline: 47 Analysts Cover Apple. Their Average Price Target Is Now Below the Stock Price, One Week Before Earnings.
news.summary: Wall Street still rates the iPhone maker a buy. Its own numbers say the stock has already arrived.

news.headline: Alphabet And Tesla's Blowout Capex Plans Are Shifting Investor Perceptions And Valuation Metrics
news.summary: A regime shift driven by higher interest rates and an elevated cost of capital is creating valuation and profitability challenges for tech giants as investors pay keen attention to profitability metrics.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $691.96 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $738.18 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Strong Bearish — favor puts / short delta.
Use QQQ $691.96 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: MSFT PUT — enter $17.12–$18.92, target $27.03+, stop $10.81.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -1.90% and SPY -1.23%. Composite sentiment -67 (Strong Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, spy trend, vix. VIX at 17.56 (+5.12%). Environment read: favor puts / short delta. Healthcare (+1.97%) is leading while Consumer Discretionary (-9.54%) lags. Premarket strength in LLY, XOM; weakness in TSLA, GOOGL. The desk's highest-conviction setup is MSFT (7.6/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
